subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Fadá'il! For eight years, as thou well knowest, I have endured intense trials, tribulations, afflictions and restrictions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضائل هشت سال بود شما میدانید که از شدت بلایا و محن و آلام و تضییقات
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
